members.name: GetParam
members.summary: Returns the minimum and maximum values of the given [param param] as a vector. The [code]x[/code] component of the returned vector corresponds to minimum and the [code]y[/code] component corresponds to maximum.

members.name: GetParamMax
members.summary: Returns the maximum value range for the given parameter.

members.name: GetParamMin
members.summary: Returns the minimum value range for the given parameter.

members.name: GetParamTexture
members.summary: Returns the [Texture2D] used by the specified parameter.

members.name: GetParticleFlag
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified particle flag is enabled.

members.name: SetParam
members.signature: public void SetParam(int param, Vector2 value)
members.summary: Sets the minimum and maximum values of the given [param param]. The [code]x[/code] component of the argument vector corresponds to minimum and the [code]y[/code] component corresponds to maximum.

members.name: SetParamMax
members.signature: public void SetParamMax(int param, float value)
members.summary: Sets the maximum value range for the given parameter.

members.name: SetParamMin
members.signature: public void SetParamMin(int param, float value)
members.summary: Sets the minimum value range for the given parameter.

members.name: SetParamTexture
members.signature: public void SetParamTexture(int param, Texture2D texture)
members.summary: Sets the [Texture2D] for the specified [enum Parameter].

members.name: SetParticleFlag
members.signature: public void SetParticleFlag(int particleFlag, bool enable)
members.summary: Sets the [param particle_flag] to [param enable].

members.name: AlphaCurve
members.summary: The alpha value of each particle's color will be multiplied by this [CurveTexture] over its lifetime. [b]Note:[/b] [member alpha_curve] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALPHA *= COLOR.a;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member alpha_curve] will have no visible effect.

members.name: AngleCurve
members.summary: Each particle's rotation will be animated along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: AngleMax
members.summary: Maximum initial rotation applied to each particle, in degrees. Only applied when [member particle_flag_disable_z] or [member particle_flag_rotate_y] are [code]true[/code] or the [BaseMaterial3D] being used to draw the particle is using [constant BaseMaterial3D.BILLBOARD_PARTICLES].

members.name: AngleMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member angle_max].

members.name: AngularVelocityCurve
members.summary: Each particle's angular velocity (rotation speed) will vary along this [CurveTexture] over its lifetime.

members.name: AngularVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum initial angular velocity (rotation speed) applied to each particle in [i]degrees[/i] per second. Only applied when [member particle_flag_disable_z] or [member particle_flag_rotate_y] are [code]true[/code] or the [BaseMaterial3D] being used to draw the particle is using [constant BaseMaterial3D.BILLBOARD_PARTICLES].

members.name: AngularVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member angular_velocity_max].

members.name: AnimOffsetCurve
members.summary: Each particle's animation offset will vary along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: AnimOffsetMax
members.summary: Maximum animation offset that corresponds to frame index in the texture. [code]0[/code] is the first frame, [code]1[/code] is the last one. See [member CanvasItemMaterial.particles_animation].

members.name: AnimOffsetMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member anim_offset_max].

members.name: AnimSpeedCurve
members.summary: Each particle's animation speed will vary along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: AnimSpeedMax
members.summary: Maximum particle animation speed. Animation speed of [code]1[/code] means that the particles will make full [code]0[/code] to [code]1[/code] offset cycle during lifetime, [code]2[/code] means [code]2[/code] cycles etc. With animation speed greater than [code]1[/code], remember to enable [member CanvasItemMaterial.particles_anim_loop] property if you want the animation to repeat.

members.name: AnimSpeedMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member anim_speed_max].

members.name: AttractorInteractionEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], interaction with particle attractors is enabled. In 3D, attraction only occurs within the area defined by the [GPUParticles3D] node's [member GPUParticles3D.visibility_aabb].

members.name: CollisionBounce
members.summary: The particles' bounciness. Values range from [code]0[/code] (no bounce) to [code]1[/code] (full bounciness). Only effective if [member collision_mode] is [constant COLLISION_RIGID].

members.name: CollisionFriction
members.summary: The particles' friction. Values range from [code]0[/code] (frictionless) to [code]1[/code] (maximum friction). Only effective if [member collision_mode] is [constant COLLISION_RIGID].

members.name: CollisionMode
members.summary: The particles' collision mode. [b]Note:[/b] 3D Particles can only collide with [GPUParticlesCollision3D] nodes, not [PhysicsBody3D] nodes. To make particles collide with various objects, you can add [GPUParticlesCollision3D] nodes as children of [PhysicsBody3D] nodes. In 3D, collisions only occur within the area defined by the [GPUParticles3D] node's [member GPUParticles3D.visibility_aabb]. [b]Note:[/b] 2D Particles can only collide with [LightOccluder2D] nodes, not [PhysicsBody2D] nodes.

members.name: CollisionUseScale
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], [member GPUParticles3D.collision_base_size] is multiplied by the particle's effective scale (see [member scale_min], [member scale_max], [member scale_curve], and [member scale_over_velocity_curve]).

members.name: Color
members.summary: Each particle's initial color. If the [GPUParticles2D]'s [code]texture[/code] is defined, it will be multiplied by this color. [b]Note:[/b] [member color] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member color] will have no visible effect.

members.name: ColorInitialRamp
members.summary: Each particle's initial color will vary along this [GradientTexture1D] (multiplied with [member color]). [b]Note:[/b] [member color_initial_ramp] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member color_initial_ramp] will have no visible effect.

members.name: ColorRamp
members.summary: Each particle's color will vary along this [GradientTexture1D] over its lifetime (multiplied with [member color]). [b]Note:[/b] [member color_ramp] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member color_ramp] will have no visible effect.

members.name: DampingCurve
members.summary: Damping will vary along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: DampingMax
members.summary: The maximum rate at which particles lose velocity. For example value of [code]100[/code] means that the particle will go from [code]100[/code] velocity to [code]0[/code] in [code]1[/code] second.

members.name: DampingMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member damping_max].

members.name: Direction
members.summary: Unit vector specifying the particles' emission direction.

members.name: DirectionalVelocityCurve
members.summary: A curve that specifies the velocity along each of the axes of the particle system along its lifetime. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: DirectionalVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum directional velocity value, which is multiplied by [member directional_velocity_curve]. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: DirectionalVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum directional velocity value, which is multiplied by [member directional_velocity_curve]. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: EmissionBoxExtents
members.summary: The box's extents if [member emission_shape] is set to [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_BOX]. [b]Note:[/b] [member emission_box_extents] starts from the center point and applies the X, Y, and Z values in both directions. The size is twice the area of the extents.

members.name: EmissionColorTexture
members.summary: Particle color will be modulated by color determined by sampling this texture at the same point as the [member emission_point_texture]. [b]Note:[/b] [member emission_color_texture] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member emission_color_texture] will have no visible effect.

members.name: EmissionCurve
members.summary: Each particle's color will be multiplied by this [CurveTexture] over its lifetime. [b]Note:[/b] [member emission_curve] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member emission_curve] will have no visible effect.

members.name: EmissionNormalTexture
members.summary: Particle velocity and rotation will be set by sampling this texture at the same point as the [member emission_point_texture]. Used only in [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS]. Can be created automatically from mesh or node by selecting "Create Emission Points from Mesh/Node" under the "Particles" tool in the toolbar.

members.name: EmissionPointCount
members.summary: The number of emission points if [member emission_shape] is set to [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS] or [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS].

members.name: EmissionPointTexture
members.summary: Particles will be emitted at positions determined by sampling this texture at a random position. Used with [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS] and [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS]. Can be created automatically from mesh or node by selecting "Create Emission Points from Mesh/Node" under the "Particles" tool in the toolbar.

members.name: EmissionRingAxis
members.summary: The axis of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionRingConeAngle
members.summary: The angle of the cone when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING]. The default angle of 90 degrees results in a ring, while an angle of 0 degrees results in a cone. Intermediate values will result in a ring where one end is larger than the other. [b]Note:[/b] Depending on [member emission_ring_height], the angle may be clamped if the ring's end is reached to form a perfect cone.

members.name: EmissionRingHeight
members.summary: The height of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionRingInnerRadius
members.summary: The inner radius of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionRingRadius
members.summary: The radius of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionShape
members.summary: Particles will be emitted inside this region.

members.name: EmissionShapeOffset
members.summary: The offset for the [member emission_shape], in local space.

members.name: EmissionShapeScale
members.summary: The scale of the [member emission_shape], in local space.

members.name: EmissionSphereRadius
members.summary: The sphere's radius if [member emission_shape] is set to [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE].

members.name: Flatness
members.summary: Amount of [member spread] along the Y axis.

members.name: Gravity
members.summary: Gravity applied to every particle.

members.name: HueVariationCurve
members.summary: Each particle's hue will vary along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: HueVariationMax
members.summary: Maximum initial hue variation applied to each particle. It will shift the particle color's hue.

members.name: HueVariationMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member hue_variation_max].

members.name: InheritVelocityRatio
members.summary: Percentage of the velocity of the respective [GPUParticles2D] or [GPUParticles3D] inherited by each particle when spawning.

members.name: InitialVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum initial velocity magnitude for each particle. Direction comes from [member direction] and [member spread].

members.name: InitialVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member initial_velocity_max].

members.name: LifetimeRandomness
members.summary: Particle lifetime randomness ratio. The equation for the lifetime of a particle is [code]lifetime * (1.0 - randf() * lifetime_randomness)[/code]. For example, a [member lifetime_randomness] of [code]0.4[/code] scales the lifetime between [code]0.6[/code] to [code]1.0[/code] of its original value.

members.name: LinearAccelCurve
members.summary: Each particle's linear acceleration will vary along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: LinearAccelMax
members.summary: Maximum linear acceleration applied to each particle in the direction of motion.

members.name: LinearAccelMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member linear_accel_max].

members.name: OrbitVelocityCurve
members.summary: Each particle's orbital velocity will vary along this [CurveTexture]. [b]Note:[/b] For 3D orbital velocity, use a [CurveXYZTexture]. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: OrbitVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum orbital velocity applied to each particle. Makes the particles circle around origin. Specified in number of full rotations around origin per second. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: OrbitVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member orbit_velocity_max]. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: ParticleFlagAlignY
members.summary: Align Y axis of particle with the direction of its velocity.

members.name: ParticleFlagDampingAsFriction
members.summary: Changes the behavior of the damping properties from a linear deceleration to a deceleration based on speed percentage.

members.name: ParticleFlagDisableZ
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles will not move on the z axis.

members.name: ParticleFlagInheritEmitterScale
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles will inherit the scale of the emitter. [b]Note:[/b] This has no effect when [member GPUParticles3D.local_coords] is [code]true[/code], since particles in local space are already affected by the emitter's scale.

members.name: ParticleFlagRotateY
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles rotate around Y axis by [member angle_min].

members.name: RadialAccelCurve
members.summary: Each particle's radial acceleration will vary along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: RadialAccelMax
members.summary: Maximum radial acceleration applied to each particle. Makes particle accelerate away from the origin or towards it if negative.

members.name: RadialAccelMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member radial_accel_max].

members.name: RadialVelocityCurve
members.summary: A [CurveTexture] that defines the velocity over the particle's lifetime away (or toward) the [member velocity_pivot]. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: RadialVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum radial velocity applied to each particle. Makes particles move away from the [member velocity_pivot], or toward it if negative. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: RadialVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum radial velocity applied to each particle. Makes particles move away from the [member velocity_pivot], or toward it if negative. [b]Note:[/b] Animated velocities will not be affected by damping, use [member velocity_limit_curve] instead.

members.name: Rotation3dMax
members.summary: The maximum 3D orientation, in degrees. Works only in 3D and if [member use_rotation_3d] is enabled.

members.name: Rotation3dMin
members.summary: The minimum 3D orientation, in degrees. Works only in 3D and if [member use_rotation_3d] is enabled.

members.name: RotationVelocity3dCurve
members.summary: Rotation velocity curve over lifetime, per-axis. Enable [member use_rotation_velocity_3d] to use this.

members.name: RotationVelocity3dMax
members.summary: Maximum 3D rotation velocity on the particle's local axis. Enable [member use_rotation_velocity_3d] to use this.

members.name: RotationVelocity3dMin
members.summary: Minimum 3D rotation velocity on the particle's local axis. Enable [member use_rotation_velocity_3d] to use this.

members.name: Scale3dMax
members.summary: The maximum value of the random scale vector for each particle. Works only if [member use_scale_3d] is enabled.

members.name: Scale3dMin
members.summary: The minimum value of the random scale vector for each particle. Works only if [member use_scale_3d] is enabled.

members.name: ScaleCurve
members.summary: Each particle's scale will vary along this [CurveTexture] over its lifetime. If a [CurveXYZTexture] is supplied instead, the scale will be separated per-axis.

members.name: ScaleMax
members.summary: Maximum initial scale applied to each particle.

members.name: ScaleMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member scale_max].

members.name: ScaleOverVelocityCurve
members.summary: Either a [CurveTexture] or a [CurveXYZTexture] that scales each particle based on its velocity.

members.name: ScaleOverVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum velocity value reference for [member scale_over_velocity_curve]. [member scale_over_velocity_curve] will be interpolated between [member scale_over_velocity_min] and [member scale_over_velocity_max].

members.name: ScaleOverVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum velocity value reference for [member scale_over_velocity_curve]. [member scale_over_velocity_curve] will be interpolated between [member scale_over_velocity_min] and [member scale_over_velocity_max].

members.name: Spread
members.summary: Each particle's initial direction range from [code]+spread[/code] to [code]-spread[/code] degrees.

members.name: SubEmitterAmountAtCollision
members.summary: The amount of particles to spawn from the subemitter node when a collision occurs. When combined with [constant COLLISION_HIDE_ON_CONTACT] on the main particles material, this can be used to achieve effects such as raindrops hitting the ground. [b]Note:[/b] This value shouldn't exceed [member GPUParticles2D.amount] or [member GPUParticles3D.amount] defined on the [i]subemitter node[/i] (not the main node), relative to the subemitter's particle lifetime. If the number of particles is exceeded, no new particles will spawn from the subemitter until enough particles have expired.

members.name: SubEmitterAmountAtEnd
members.summary: The amount of particles to spawn from the subemitter node when the particle expires. [b]Note:[/b] This value shouldn't exceed [member GPUParticles2D.amount] or [member GPUParticles3D.amount] defined on the [i]subemitter node[/i] (not the main node), relative to the subemitter's particle lifetime. If the number of particles is exceeded, no new particles will spawn from the subemitter until enough particles have expired.

members.name: SubEmitterAmountAtStart
members.summary: The amount of particles to spawn from the subemitter node when the particle spawns. [b]Note:[/b] This value shouldn't exceed [member GPUParticles2D.amount] or [member GPUParticles3D.amount] defined on the [i]subemitter node[/i] (not the main node), relative to the subemitter's particle lifetime. If the number of particles is exceeded, no new particles will spawn from the subemitter until enough particles have expired.

members.name: SubEmitterFrequency
members.summary: The frequency at which particles should be emitted from the subemitter node. One particle will be spawned every [member sub_emitter_frequency] seconds. [b]Note:[/b] This value shouldn't exceed [member GPUParticles2D.amount] or [member GPUParticles3D.amount] defined on the [i]subemitter node[/i] (not the main node), relative to the subemitter's particle lifetime. If the number of particles is exceeded, no new particles will spawn from the subemitter until enough particles have expired.

members.name: SubEmitterKeepVelocity
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the subemitter inherits the parent particle's velocity when it spawns.

members.name: SubEmitterMode
members.summary: The particle subemitter mode (see [member GPUParticles2D.sub_emitter] and [member GPUParticles3D.sub_emitter]).

members.name: TangentialAccelCurve
members.summary: Each particle's tangential acceleration will vary along this [CurveTexture].

members.name: TangentialAccelMax
members.summary: Maximum tangential acceleration applied to each particle. Tangential acceleration is perpendicular to the particle's velocity giving the particles a swirling motion.

members.name: TangentialAccelMin
members.summary: Minimum equivalent of [member tangential_accel_max].

members.name: TurbulenceEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enables turbulence for the particle system. Turbulence can be used to vary particle movement according to its position (based on a 3D noise pattern). In 3D, [GPUParticlesAttractorVectorField3D] with [NoiseTexture3D] can be used as an alternative to turbulence that works in world space and with multiple particle systems reacting in the same way. [b]Note:[/b] Enabling turbulence has a high performance cost on the GPU. Only enable turbulence on a few particle systems at once at most, and consider disabling it when targeting mobile/web platforms.

members.name: TurbulenceInfluenceMax
members.summary: Maximum turbulence influence on each particle. The actual amount of turbulence influence on each particle is calculated as a random value between [member turbulence_influence_min] and [member turbulence_influence_max] and multiplied by the amount of turbulence influence from [member turbulence_influence_over_life].

members.name: TurbulenceInfluenceMin
members.summary: Minimum turbulence influence on each particle. The actual amount of turbulence influence on each particle is calculated as a random value between [member turbulence_influence_min] and [member turbulence_influence_max] and multiplied by the amount of turbulence influence from [member turbulence_influence_over_life].

members.name: TurbulenceInfluenceOverLife
members.summary: Each particle's amount of turbulence will be influenced along this [CurveTexture] over its life time.

members.name: TurbulenceInitialDisplacementMax
members.summary: Maximum displacement of each particle's spawn position by the turbulence. The actual amount of displacement will be a factor of the underlying turbulence multiplied by a random value between [member turbulence_initial_displacement_min] and [member turbulence_initial_displacement_max].

members.name: TurbulenceInitialDisplacementMin
members.summary: Minimum displacement of each particle's spawn position by the turbulence. The actual amount of displacement will be a factor of the underlying turbulence multiplied by a random value between [member turbulence_initial_displacement_min] and [member turbulence_initial_displacement_max].

members.name: TurbulenceNoiseScale
members.summary: This value controls the overall scale/frequency of the turbulence noise pattern. A small scale will result in smaller features with more detail while a high scale will result in smoother noise with larger features.

members.name: TurbulenceNoiseSpeed
members.summary: A scrolling velocity for the turbulence field. This sets a directional trend for the pattern to move in over time. The default value of [code]Vector3(0, 0, 0)[/code] turns off the scrolling.

members.name: TurbulenceNoiseSpeedRandom
members.summary: The in-place rate of change of the turbulence field. This defines how quickly the noise pattern varies over time. A value of 0.0 will result in a fixed pattern.

members.name: TurbulenceNoiseStrength
members.summary: The turbulence noise strength. Increasing this will result in a stronger, more contrasting, flow pattern.

members.name: UseRotation3d
members.summary: Enable the usage of [member rotation_3d_min] and [member rotation_3d_max].

members.name: UseRotationVelocity3d
members.summary: Enable 3D rotation velocity.

members.name: UseScale3d
members.summary: Enable the usage of [member scale_3d_min] and [member scale_3d_max].

members.name: VelocityLimitCurve
members.summary: A [CurveTexture] that defines the maximum velocity of a particle during its lifetime.

members.name: VelocityPivot
members.summary: A pivot point used to calculate radial and orbital velocity of particles.

signals.name: EmissionShapeChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when this material's emission shape is changed in any way. This includes changes to [member emission_shape], [member emission_shape_scale], or [member emission_sphere_radius], and any other property that affects the emission shape's offset, size, scale, or orientation. [b]Note:[/b] This signal is only emitted inside the editor for performance reasons.

values.name: COLLISION_DISABLED
values.summary: No collision for particles. Particles will go through [GPUParticlesCollision3D] nodes.

values.name: COLLISION_HIDE_ON_CONTACT
values.summary: Hide particles instantly when colliding with a [GPUParticlesCollision3D] node. This can be combined with a subemitter that uses the [constant COLLISION_RIGID] collision mode to "replace" the parent particle with the subemitter on impact.

values.name: COLLISION_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum CollisionMode] enum.

values.name: COLLISION_RIGID
values.summary: [RigidBody3D]-style collision for particles using [GPUParticlesCollision3D] nodes.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_BOX
values.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a box.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS
values.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position determined by sampling a random point on the [member emission_point_texture]. Particle velocity and rotation will be set based on [member emission_normal_texture]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_color_texture].

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum EmissionShape] enum.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINT
values.summary: All particles will be emitted from a single point.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS
values.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position determined by sampling a random point on the [member emission_point_texture]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_color_texture].

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_RING
values.summary: Particles will be emitted in a ring or cylinder.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE
values.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a sphere.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE_SURFACE
values.summary: Particles will be emitted on the surface of a sphere.

values.name: PARAM_ANGLE
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set angle properties.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set angular velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_ANIM_OFFSET
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set animation offset properties.

values.name: PARAM_ANIM_SPEED
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set animation speed properties.

values.name: PARAM_DAMPING
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set damping properties.

values.name: PARAM_DIRECTIONAL_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set directional velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_HUE_VARIATION
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set hue variation properties.

values.name: PARAM_INITIAL_LINEAR_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set initial velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_ACCEL
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set linear acceleration properties.

values.name: PARAM_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Parameter] enum.

values.name: PARAM_ORBIT_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set orbital velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_RADIAL_ACCEL
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set radial acceleration properties.

values.name: PARAM_RADIAL_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set radial velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_SCALE
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set scale properties.

values.name: PARAM_SCALE_OVER_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set scale over velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_TANGENTIAL_ACCEL
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set tangential acceleration properties.

values.name: PARAM_TURB_INFLUENCE_OVER_LIFE
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_texture] to set the turbulence influence over the particles life time.

values.name: PARAM_TURB_INIT_DISPLACEMENT
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min] and [method set_param_max] to set the turbulence minimum and maximum displacement of the particles spawn position.

values.name: PARAM_TURB_VEL_INFLUENCE
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min] and [method set_param_max] to set the turbulence minimum und maximum influence on each particles velocity.

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ALIGN_Y_TO_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_align_y].

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_DISABLE_Z
values.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_disable_z].

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ParticleFlags] enum.

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ROTATE_Y
values.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_rotate_y].

values.name: SUB_EMITTER_AT_COLLISION
values.summary: The subemitter is emitted when the particle collides.

values.name: SUB_EMITTER_AT_END
values.summary: The subemitter is emitted at the end of the particle's lifetime.

values.name: SUB_EMITTER_AT_START
values.summary: The subemitter is emitted when the particle spawns.

values.name: SUB_EMITTER_CONSTANT
values.summary: The submitter is emitted on the constant interval defined by [member sub_emitter_frequency].

values.name: SUB_EMITTER_DISABLED
values.summary: The subemitter is disabled.

values.name: SUB_EMITTER_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum SubEmitterMode] enum.

constants.name: PARAM_INITIAL_LINEAR_VELOCITY

constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set damping properties.

constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set angle properties.

constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set scale properties.

constants.name: PARAM_HUE_VARIATION
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set hue variation properties.

constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set animation speed properties.

constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set animation offset properties.

constants.name: PARAM_RADIAL_VELOCITY
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_texture] to set radial velocity properties.

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ALIGN_Y_TO_VELOCITY
constants.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_align_y].

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ROTATE_Y
constants.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_rotate_y].

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_DISABLE_Z
constants.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_disable_z].

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ParticleFlags] enum.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINT
constants.summary: All particles will be emitted from a single point.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a sphere.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE_SURFACE
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted on the surface of a sphere.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_BOX
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a box.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position determined by sampling a random point on the [member emission_point_texture]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_color_texture].

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position determined by sampling a random point on the [member emission_point_texture]. Particle velocity and rotation will be set based on [member emission_normal_texture]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_color_texture].

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_RING
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted in a ring or cylinder.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum EmissionShape] enum.

constants.name: PARAM_TURB_VEL_INFLUENCE
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min] and [method set_param_max] to set the turbulence minimum und maximum influence on each particles velocity.

constants.name: PARAM_TURB_INIT_DISPLACEMENT
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min] and [method set_param_max] to set the turbulence minimum and maximum displacement of the particles spawn position.

constants.name: PARAM_TURB_INFLUENCE_OVER_LIFE
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_texture] to set the turbulence influence over the particles life time.

constants.name: SUB_EMITTER_DISABLED
constants.summary: The subemitter is disabled.

constants.name: SUB_EMITTER_CONSTANT
constants.summary: The submitter is emitted on the constant interval defined by [member sub_emitter_frequency].

constants.name: SUB_EMITTER_AT_END
constants.summary: The subemitter is emitted at the end of the particle's lifetime.

constants.name: SUB_EMITTER_AT_COLLISION
constants.summary: The subemitter is emitted when the particle collides.

constants.name: SUB_EMITTER_AT_START
constants.summary: The subemitter is emitted when the particle spawns.

constants.name: SUB_EMITTER_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum SubEmitterMode] enum.

constants.name: COLLISION_DISABLED
constants.summary: No collision for particles. Particles will go through [GPUParticlesCollision3D] nodes.

constants.name: COLLISION_RIGID
constants.summary: [RigidBody3D]-style collision for particles using [GPUParticlesCollision3D] nodes.

constants.name: COLLISION_HIDE_ON_CONTACT
constants.summary: Hide particles instantly when colliding with a [GPUParticlesCollision3D] node. This can be combined with a subemitter that uses the [constant COLLISION_RIGID] collision mode to "replace" the parent particle with the subemitter on impact.

constants.name: COLLISION_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum CollisionMode] enum.
